use_cases: Showcasing creative work and photography portfolios with radial scroll navigation
Displaying image collections with smooth scroll-based animations
Creating interactive gallery experiences for designer or photographer websites
Building visual hierarchies with overlaid badge elements for categorization
Providing immersive portfolio browsing on landing pages
ai_summary: A portfolio and image gallery component featuring radial scroll navigation with animated transitions. Supports multiple image display with overlay badges for categorization. Designed for creative professionals showcasing visual work with smooth scroll-driven animations and hover interactions. Typically used on portfolio websites and creative agency landing pages with minimalist or gradient visual styling.
